question: Find products that cost more than $50
sql: SELECT ProductName, UnitPrice FROM Products WHERE UnitPrice > 50;

question: Show me the most ordered product
sql: SELECT P.ProductName, COUNT(OD.OrderID) AS OrderCount FROM Products P INNER JOIN OrderDetails OD ON P.ProductID = OD.ProductID GROUP BY P.ProductName ORDER BY OrderCount DESC LIMIT 1;

question: What are the top 10 most expensive tracks?
sql: SELECT Name, UnitPrice FROM Track ORDER BY UnitPrice DESC LIMIT 10;

question: Who are the artists that made the songs named Torn and Hero?
sql: SELECT DISTINCT AR.Name FROM Artist AS AR INNER JOIN Album AS A ON AR.ArtistId = A.ArtistId INNER JOIN Track AS T ON A.AlbumId = T.AlbumId WHERE T.Name IN ('Torn', 'Hero');

question: Show me 5 songs made by the artist named Battlestar Galactica
sql: SELECT DISTINCT T.Name, AR.Name AS BattlestarGalacticaName FROM Track AS T INNER JOIN Album AS A ON T.AlbumId = A.AlbumId INNER JOIN Artist AS AR ON A.ArtistId = AR.ArtistId WHERE AR.Name = 'Battlestar Galactica';

question: List all the albums by Iron Maiden
sql: SELECT DISTINCT A.Title FROM Album AS A INNER JOIN Artist AS AR ON A.ArtistId = AR.ArtistId WHERE AR.Name = 'Iron Maiden';

question: What is the email address of the customer named Luís Gonçalves?
sql: SELECT C.Email FROM Customer AS C WHERE C.FirstName = 'Luís' AND C.LastName = 'Gonçalves';
original_sql: SELECT C.Email FROM Customer AS C

question: What is the total revenue generated by each sales support agent?
sql: SELECT Employee.FirstName, Employee.LastName, SUM(Invoice.Total) AS TotalRevenue FROM Employee JOIN Customer ON Employee.EmployeeId = Customer.SupportRepId JOIN Invoice ON Customer.CustomerId = Invoice.CustomerId GROUP BY Employee.EmployeeId, Employee.FirstName, Employee.LastName;
original_sql: SELECT E.FirstName, E.LastName, SUM(I.Amount) AS TotalRevenue FROM Employee AS E JOIN SupportRep AS S ON E.EmployeeId = S.EmployeeId JOIN Invoice AS I ON S.SupportRepId = I.SupportRepId GROUP BY E.EmployeeId ORDER BY TotalRevenue DESC;

question: What is the most purchased song
sql: SELECT T.Name, COUNT(I.InvoiceLineId) AS TotalPurchases FROM Track AS T JOIN InvoiceLine AS I ON T.TrackId = I.TrackId GROUP BY T.Name ORDER BY TotalPurchases DESC LIMIT 1;
original_sql: SELECT T.Name, COUNT(I.InvoiceId) AS TotalPurchases FROM Track AS T INNER JOIN Invoice AS I ON T.TrackId = I.TrackId GROUP BY T.Name ORDER BY TotalPurchases DESC LIMIT 1;

question: List the names of all products in the 'Seafood' category.
sql: SELECT P.ProductName FROM Products P INNER JOIN Categories C ON P.CategoryID = C.CategoryID WHERE C.CategoryName = 'Seafood';

question: Calculate the total revenue generated from the sales of 'Tofu'.
sql: SELECT SUM(OD.Quantity * P.UnitPrice) AS TotalRevenue FROM OrderDetails OD INNER JOIN Products P ON OD.ProductID = P.ProductID WHERE P.ProductName = 'Tofu';

question: Which customers have placed more than 15 orders?
sql: SELECT C.CompanyName, COUNT(O.OrderID) AS NumberOfOrders FROM Customers C JOIN Orders O ON C.CustomerID = O.CustomerID GROUP BY C.CustomerID HAVING COUNT(O.OrderID) > 15;
original_sql: SELECT C.CustomerID, COUNT(OD.OrderID) AS NumberOfOrders FROM Customers C JOIN CustomerCustomerDemo CD ON C.CustomerID = CD.CustomerID JOIN OrderDetails OD ON CD.CustomerID = OD.CustomerID GROUP BY C.CustomerID HAVING COUNT(OD.OrderID) > 15;

question: List the top 3 suppliers based on the total revenue of the products they supply.
sql: SELECT S.CompanyName, SUM(OD.Quantity * P.UnitPrice) AS TotalRevenue FROM Suppliers S JOIN Products P ON S.SupplierID = P.SupplierID JOIN OrderDetails OD ON P.ProductID = OD.ProductID GROUP BY S.SupplierID ORDER BY TotalRevenue DESC LIMIT 3;

question: What are the best-selling products by quantity?
sql:
SELECT P.ProductName, SUM(OD.Quantity * P.UnitPrice) AS TotalSales
FROM Products P
JOIN OrderDetails OD ON P.ProductID = OD.ProductID
GROUP BY P.ProductName
ORDER BY TotalSales DESC
LIMIT 1;

question: Who are the top 5 customers based on total purchase amount?
sql:
SELECT C.CompanyName, SUM(OD.Quantity * OD.UnitPrice) AS TotalPurchaseAmount
FROM Customers C
JOIN Orders O ON C.CustomerID = O.CustomerID
JOIN OrderDetails OD ON O.OrderID = OD.OrderID
GROUP BY C.CompanyName
ORDER BY TotalPurchaseAmount DESC
LIMIT 5;

question: What are the top 5 most popular genres based on the number of tracks sold?
sql:
SELECT G.Name, COUNT(I.InvoiceLineId) AS TotalPurchases
FROM Genre AS G
JOIN Track AS T ON G.GenreId = T.GenreId -- Corrected the join to use Genre table with its ID linked to Tracks' genre
JOIN InvoiceLine AS I ON T.TrackId = I.TrackId -- Ensuring we count invoice lines, which relate individual track sales
GROUP BY G.Name
ORDER BY TotalPurchases DESC
LIMIT 5;

question: How many tracks are there in each genre? Show the results from most to least.
sql:
SELECT G.Name, COUNT(T.TrackId) AS TotalTracks -- Assuming Track table is named T and Genre table is named G in schema
FROM Genre AS G
JOIN Track AS T ON G.GenreId = T.GenreId -- Corrected the join condition based on common key between Genre and Track tables
GROUP BY G.Name
ORDER BY TotalTracks DESC
LIMIT 5;

question: Show me all the employees hired after 2003
sql: SELECT * FROM Employee WHERE HireDate > '2003-01-01';

question: How many tracks does each playlist contain?
sql:
SELECT P.Name AS PlaylistName, COUNT(PT.TrackId) AS TotalTracks
FROM Playlist AS P
JOIN PlaylistTrack AS PT ON P.PlaylistId = PT.PlaylistId -- Join between Playlist and its associated tracks through the bridge table
GROUP BY P.Name
ORDER BY TotalTracks DESC;

question: What is the total revenue generated from sales in each country?
sql:
SELECT I.BillingCountry, SUM(IL.UnitPrice * IL.Quantity) AS TotalRevenueCount
FROM InvoiceLine IL
JOIN Invoice I ON IL.InvoiceId = I.InvoiceId -- Join invoice line details with the main invoice table using common key (InvoiceId)
GROUP BY I.BillingCountry
ORDER BY SUM(IL.UnitPrice * IL.Quantity) DESC;

question: Which artist has the most albums?
sql:
SELECT A.Name, COUNT(*) AS AlbumCount
FROM Album AS A
JOIN Artist AS AR ON A.ArtistId = AR.ArtistId -- Join Albums with their respective artists using common key (ArtistId)
GROUP BY A.ArtistId
ORDER BY AlbumCount DESC LIMIT 1;

question: What are the longest tracks in each genre?
sql:
SELECT G.Name AS GenreName, MAX(T.Milliseconds) AS LongestTrackDuration, T.Name AS TrackName
FROM Genre AS G
JOIN Track AS T ON G.GenreId = T.GenreId -- Ensure the join is between genre and track using common key (GenreId) for duration comparison
GROUP BY G.Name;

question: list all products from the 'Beverages' category
sql: SELECT P.ProductName FROM Products P INNER JOIN Categories C ON P.CategoryID = C.CategoryID WHERE C.CategoryName = 'Beverages';

question: How many orders has each customer placed?
sql: SELECT C.CompanyName, COUNT(O.OrderID) AS NumberOfOrders FROM Customers C JOIN Orders O ON C.CustomerID = O.CustomerID GROUP BY C.CompanyName HAVING COUNT(O.OrderID) > 15;

question: List all products that are currently out of stock
sql: SELECT P.ProductName FROM Products P WHERE P.UnitsInStock = 0;

question: which actors have the first name 'JOHN'?
sql: SELECT first_name, last_name FROM actor WHERE first_name = 'JOHN'

question: list the top 10 most rented films
sql: SELECT title FROM film JOIN inventory ON film.film_id = inventory.film_id GROUP BY title ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 10

question: How many films are in each rating category (G, PG, PG-13, R, NC-17)?
sql: SELECT rating, COUNT(*) FROM film GROUP BY rating ORDER BY COUNT(*) DESC LIMIT 10

question: which actors appear in the most films?
sql:
SELECT A.first_name, A.last_name, COUNT(*) AS num_films
FROM actor AS A
JOIN film_actor AS FA ON A.actor_id = FA.actor_id
GROUP BY A.actor_id
ORDER BY num_films DESC
LIMIT 1

question: which films are currently rented out (not yet returned)?
sql: SELECT F.title FROM film AS F JOIN inventory AS I ON F.film_id = I.film_id WHERE I.store_id = 1 AND I.inventory_id NOT IN (SELECT rental_id FROM rental) LIMIT 10

question: which customers have spent more than 150$ total?
sql: SELECT C.first_name, C.last_name, SUM(P.amount) AS total_spent FROM customer AS C JOIN payment AS P ON C.customer_id = P.customer_id GROUP BY C.customer_id HAVING total_spent > 150 LIMIT 10

question: which store has generated more total revenue?
sql: SELECT S.store_id FROM store AS S JOIN inventory AS I ON S.store_id = I.store_id WHERE I.inventory_id IN (SELECT rental_id FROM rental) GROUP BY S.store_id ORDER BY COUNT(I.inventory_id) DESC LIMIT 1

question: What is the average amount paid per rental, broken down by customer city?
sql: SELECT C.first_name, C.last_name, AVG(P.amount) AS avg_amount FROM customer AS C JOIN payment AS P ON C.customer_id = P.customer_id GROUP BY C.customer_id ORDER BY avg_amount DESC LIMIT 1

question: which actors have never appeared in an 'Action' film?
sql: SELECT A.first_name, A.last_name FROM actor AS A WHERE A.actor_id NOT IN (SELECT FA.actor_id FROM film_actor AS FA JOIN film_category AS FC ON FA.film_id = FC.film_id WHERE FC.category_id = (SELECT category_id FROM category WHERE name = 'Action'))

question: list all the films in the Comedy category
sql: SELECT title FROM film JOIN film_category ON film.film_id = film_category.film_id WHERE category_id = (SELECT category_id FROM category WHERE name = 'Comedy')

question: For each month, which film category generated the most revenue?
sql: SELECT category.name, MAX(P.amount) AS max_revenue FROM film JOIN film_category ON film.film_id = film_category.film_id JOIN category ON film_category.category_id = category.category_id JOIN inventory ON film.film_id = inventory.film_id JOIN rental ON inventory.inventory_id = rental.inventory_id JOIN payment P ON rental.rental_id = P.rental_id WHERE P.amount > 0 GROUP BY category.name ORDER BY max_revenue DESC

question: rank customers by total spending using a window function
sql: SELECT customer.first_name, customer.last_name, SUM(payment.amount) AS total_spending FROM customer JOIN payment ON customer.customer_id = payment.customer_id GROUP BY customer.customer_id ORDER BY total_spending DESC
